title: MC×Discord
description: Alternative method of linking your Discord server with your Minecraft PaperMC server
body:
<details>
<summary>About MC×Discord</summary>

MC×Discord is a lightweight alternative to traditional discord bot plugins — built specifically for server hosts that don’t allow self-hosted bots, like FMCS. if your host allows discord bots, this probably isn’t for you, would still apprechiate if you used it!

</details>



# HOW TO SET UP PLUGIN
1. Download and upload to your **/plugins** folder
2. Restart the server
3. Fill out the config
> You will have to fill out the config. The plugin will **not** boot if the plugin is not properly set up ![Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43ca61ec8993fac4192628d06df24197044808b8.png)
> After finishing the plugin config setup:
4. Restart the server again
5. Add the [Discord Bot](https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=1369292341059387433) to your server.
6. Use the /link command

Boom! You have successfully linked your Discord server with your Minecraft server.

<details>
<summary>Features & Plugin Description</summary>

# Features:
1. optimized message handling for extremely high performance
![Performance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e6c6b835fef3ae9c3d4aac251b4fff1b71ab4ee.png)



1. relay system that sends messages through our servers — no bot token needed
![How the plugin works](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18fb270053d0cadb677648d6c406645d28e40f15.png)
2.1. The delay between Discord and Minecraft is around 1-2 seconds. Messages are sent in order, if that is not the case please create an issue report.

1. active dev team that listens — your suggestions won’t get buried or ignored

</details>
